chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 197 of 2019 SCRA 198 of 2019 SCRA 199 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.8 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.1485/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1486/2019. 24.11.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press these reference applications, which are hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
